summary: High‑energy show with standout versions of Lovelight, Speedway Boogie, Schoolgirl and China > Rider, captured on a clean soundboard recording.
review: Fans rave about the hard‑driving performance that carries through to the final note of “Lovelight” and praise this vintage version of “Speedway Boogie” with its ‘nobody’s fault’ jam. The set also delivers ripping renditions of “Schoolgirl,” “New Speedway” and a tight “China > Rider” sequence, while the only gripe is the absence of the hoped‑for “Cold Jordan.” No audio issues are reported, indicating a solid soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (4–5) and enthusiastic comments about multiple songs suggest an excellent performance; reviewers do not mention any recording problems, supporting a strong overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about clarity or mix; reviewers focus on musical aspects, implying the soundboard capture is clean and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert maintains high energy throughout, with hard‑driving playing to the final note of “Lovelight” and a memorable jam in “Speedway Boogie”; overall vibe described as “good vibrations.”
